agent.command: We are recording a tutorial that demonstrates the AskUserQuestion gate flow. Call the AskUserQuestion tool exactly once with question 'Which environment do you want to deploy to?' and options ['production', 'staging', 'dev']. After receiving the user's selection, reply with exactly one line in the form: DEPLOY_TARGET-K7Q=<selection>. Use that exact prefix verbatim. Do not call any other tool. Do not add any other prose.
